justification: The diff updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21 and upgrades Mockito/ByteBuddy versions, but removes the JUnit 4 dependency entirely without adding JUnit 5 (Jupiter) engine or migrating tests, breaking the build. It also performs minor import cleanups (e.g., removing unused imports in IDao.java, dbConnection.java, userService.java) but introduces no Java 21 idioms (records, pattern matching, virtual threads, etc.). The removal of JUnit 4 without replacement is a critical flaw for a junit4-mockito migration target.
